asset.title: App Variance Fill
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A high-fidelity workflow preview demonstrating multi-agent collaboration to calculate and merge financial variance data within a spreadsheet, supported by real-time trace logs.

featureClarity.evidence: Clearly demonstrates automated variance calculations and note drafting using collaborative agents.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the entire sequence from initiating collaboration to cell locking, agent execution, and final merge.

visualDesign.evidence: Polished dark-mode interface with clean alignment, distinct status indicators, and smooth state updates.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, private/public agents, and execution traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing realistic financial data and detailed, step-by-step trace logs.

legibility.evidence: Main table elements are highly legible, though trace log text at the bottom is slightly small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for demonstrating automated financial reconciliation and auditability to enterprise users.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the latency and sequential steps of the agent execution pipeline.

observedEvidence: Spreadsheet interface with Q2 and Q3 financial data
Real-time trace log updates showing agent actions
Automatic variance calculation and cell updates
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom agents collaborate in real-time to lock cells, calculate quarterly variances, and merge drafts directly into the shared spreadsheet with full auditability.
